runTitle: Vercel broad QA - v8.11.12 production frontend and AI refresh
coveredSurfaces: landing render and version badge on production v8.11.12
dashboard summary render with total 15 / online 14 / warning 1 / risk 0 / offline 0
dashboard system resource panel render with CPU 37 / Memory 47 / Disk 37
active alerts modal render and ESC close
topology modal render with 15 nodes / 20 edges and ESC close
dashboard warning CTA opens AI sidebar with prefilled prompt
AI sidebar first-hit response completes with grounded disk warning analysis
AI sidebar analysis basis detail shows traceId + tools + timeRange
/dashboard/ai-assistant fullscreen workspace restores the same conversation
fullscreen analysis basis detail preserves traceId + tools + timeRange parity
/api/version 200 on production with version 8.11.12 / nextjs 16.1.6 / environment production

expertAssessments.rationale: Core routes, dashboard modal pack, AI sidebar, fullscreen workspace, API checks, and console cleanliness were validated in one production browser session.
The storage warning analysis returned grounded content and fullscreen retained the same traceId, tool chain, and recent 1 hour time range after hydration.
Dashboard snapshot, active alerts, topology graph, and health/version endpoints remained stable on the v8.11.12 production deployment.
Production deployment dpl_8oAdopQezsQhTUtaSMnxpkNJhuF9 was live before QA started, and Vercel usage remained within the current no-billed-usage expectation.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before broad production QA; effective 9.1391 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

artifacts.label: Dashboard with AI sidebar response on v8.11.12
Fullscreen AI workspace with preserved analysis basis detail on v8.11.12
Broad production console log on v8.11.12

notes: Landing and login remained green on production v8.11.12.
404 route produced the expected 404 page; its expected missing-route resource error was excluded from the normal-flow console cleanliness baseline.
Guest login required the current PIN modal flow and accepted PIN 4231 successfully.
Dashboard snapshot during run: total 15, online 14, warning 1, risk 0, offline 0; system resources 37/47/37.
AI warning analysis for storage-nfs-dc1-01 completed with a two-tool chain (이상 탐지, 근본 원인 분석).
Fullscreen workspace preserved traceId f38803c9d1bd80cf0ddbac782666453d and the same tool/timeRange metadata after sidebar handoff.
browser_console_messages reported 0 errors and 0 warnings across the normal landing/login/dashboard/AI flow.
